mano_cua.result_summary: 怪物详情页因JS错误(TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined reading 'length' at [id].vue:364)完全无法渲染。通过VS Code源码分析确认comma样式bug存在：Saving Throws的<li>元素使用after:content-[',_']伪元素生成逗号，该伪元素继承父元素的font-bold text-blood样式，导致逗号也是红色粗体而非普通文本样式。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Source code at [id].vue line 118 shows <li> class='inline cursor-pointer font-bold text-blood after:content-[\

] last:after:content-[] hover:text-black dark:hover:text-fog'. The comma is generated via CSS after pseudo-element which inherits the parent's red bold styling (text-blood font-bold). No separate styling overrides the comma color. Confirmed: commas inherit red bold from modifier, matching the bug description.
